dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have had a cough and trouble breathing for 4 days.
Can you tell me more about the cough and breathing trouble? For instance, did this start suddenly or gradually, and how severe would you rate your difficulty breathing on a scale of 1 to 10?
It started gradually. My cough has yellow-green spit, and I feel very tired. My breathing trouble is about a 5.
Are you allergic to any medications, foods, or environmental factors?
Yes, I have an allergy to penicillin. It gives me a rash.
[DDX] (Community-acquired pneumonia; Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease exacerbation; Congestive heart failure; Pulmonary embolism; Influenza)
